patches.find: The dome publishes no mechanism for the symmetry claim.
patches.replace: The dome publishes no mechanism or tolerance for the symmetry claim.
patches.rationale: ISS-1997: WIN-028.c8 curmudgeon recommended adding 'or tolerance' to close attack surface on the tldr_evidence final sentence.

patches.find: A second independence check: cross-validation against spectroscopic-class distance estimates (which set absolute magnitudes from stellar spectral classification rather than from a parallax-calibrated period-luminosity relation; even if spectroscopic M_V calibrations carry residual parallax dependence at the Hyades-anchored level, the dome wobble theory predicts flat amplitude regardless of which rung the calibration sits on, so the 1/d scaling falsifies the wobble at every rung) shows the same 1/d scaling, confirming that the parallax pattern is in the geometry of the data and not an artifact of the photometric calibration chain.
patches.replace: A second independence check: cross-validation against spectroscopic-class distance estimates, which set absolute magnitudes from stellar spectral classification rather than from a parallax-calibrated period-luminosity relation. Even granting that spectroscopic M_V calibrations carry residual parallax dependence at the Hyades-anchored level, the dome wobble predicts flat amplitude regardless of which rung the calibration sits on — so the 1/d scaling falsifies the wobble at every rung, and the spectroscopic-class data confirms the 1/d pattern is in the geometry, not in the photometric calibration chain.
patches.rationale: ISS-1998: WIN-017.c7 curmudgeon flagged 99-word sentence with 73-word parenthetical; split into two sentences per curmudgeon suggestion.
